steps.title: Join the two titles
steps.content: The sentence gives Gerald Clarke two linked descriptions: artist and 2007 Eiteljorg Fellowship recipient. Those two descriptions form one compound noun phrase before his name.

steps.title: Avoid unnecessary punctuation
steps.content: Choice A wrongly adds a comma before and between two linked titles. Choice C adds a dash without a matching structure. Choice D adds a trailing comma with no opening comma. No extra punctuation is needed between the two titles and the name. The answer is B.
